sections.paragraph: & חֲמוּדֹות f. pl. precious things, Dan 11:38, 43 Dan 11:43. כְּלֵי חֲמֻדֹות, בִּגְדֵּי handsome garments, precious jewels, Gen 27:15 2Ch 20:25. לֶחֶם חֲמוּדֹות more agreeable food (from which any one who fasts, abstains), Dan 10:3. אִישׁ חֲמוּדֹות verse 11 Dan 10:11, 19 Dan 10:19and without אִישׁ 9:23 , a man beloved [of God], delighted in (by heaven).
